description: Research Tor bridge types using official documentation at https://tb-manual.torproject.org/bridges/ and https://support.torproject.org/censorship/. Configure Tor Browser to use built-in obfs4 bridges. Bookmark the bridge guide as 'Tor Bridge Guide - Workshop' and the censorship support page as 'Censorship Circumvention Support'. Create a structured workshop reference document at /home/ga/Documents/bridge-workshop-guide.md. The document must be at least 300 characters long, include the heading '# Tor Bridge Workshop Guide', explain what bridges are and why they are needed, list bridge types (obfs4, snowflake, and meek-azure), and include the official bridge request URL (https://bridges.torproject.org).
